{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Champion blood
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champion blood]] contains proprietary alchemical secrets regarding the creation of [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
